title: 10 Calming Journal Prompts for Managing Daily Anxiety
intro: Managing daily anxiety is easier when you have a dedicated space to process your thoughts. These 10 prompts are designed to help you calm your mind, ground your emotions, and regain control over your day.
items: What is the one specific worry that is taking up the most space in your mind right now?
If this worry were a physical object, what would it look like, and how could you safely set it down?
List three things in your current environment that you can see, hear, and feel to ground yourself.
What is one thing you can control in your life right now, even if everything else feels uncertain?
Write down the 'worst-case scenario' and then write down three reasons why you are capable of handling it.
What would you say to a friend who was feeling the exact same anxiety you are feeling now?
Describe a time you felt completely at peace. What were you doing, and what did it feel like in your body?
What is a 'small win' from today that you can celebrate to shift your focus away from stress?
What are three positive affirmations you can repeat to yourself when you feel overwhelmed?
If your anxiety was a messenger, what is it trying to protect you from or tell you right now?
